compiled_state.title: package-lock.json version not updated during merge-to-main version bump
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: Root cause: Commit bebf7c9 (import progress UI merge from worktree-20260403-120548) bumped package.json to 0.5.0 but did not update package-lock.json — it still shows 0.4.0. The package-lock.json diff in that commit was +4/-4 lines, but those changes were for a dependency, not the version field. Main has been in this state since April 3rd. Any npm install on main regenerates package-lock.json with the correct 0.5.0 version, producing a dirty working tree that blocks the merge script. Fix: merge-to-main.sh version_bump phase should run npm install (or equivalent) after bumping package.json to sync package-lock.json.

comments.body: Gate 1a: skipped — CLI_user tag present; intent-aligned assumed
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 1 (BASIC). ROOT_CAUSE: _phase_version_bump never runs npm install after bumping package.json. Fix approved: add npm install --package-lock-only before git add -u when version file is package.json. Complexity: TRIVIAL. testing_mode=RED.
comments.author: Test
